stemHtml: On a Fly-By-Wire aeroplane, what does the automatic pitch trim system do?

options.a: If the PF changes pitch attitude and, at the desired attitude, releases control pressure, the system holds that new attitude.
options.b: It trims the aeroplane, if the autopilot has been engaged.
options.c: If the pitch attitude is alternated and control pressure released, the system returns to the previous pitch rate setting.
options.d: It performs the rotation during take-off.
